title: PRIMARY CARE - 211info
text: RAINIER HIGH SCHOOL SBHC PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Primary care services include treatment for acute and chronic medical problems, annual preventive check-ups, laboratory services, immunizations, sports physicals, child well-care checks, and mental health assessment and counseling. 28168 Old Rainier Road Rainier, OR 97048 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Clinic: Tuesday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Mental Health: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (800) 244-4870 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 244-4870 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances. Sliding scale fees may be available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Photo ID and proof of insurance, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Columbia County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4:30pm Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics Community Mental Health Agencies General Medical Care Mental Health Evaluation Pediatrics Sports Participation Physical Examinations Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OHP ASSISTER HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
